category_sources: source_facts.description says Minimal Markdown documentation generator; official docs at https://docs.docmd.io/ describe docmd as a zero-configuration documentation generator for Markdown.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is docmd; official docs and repository use the docmd name.
docs_sources: Official documentation site linked from https://github.com/docmd-io/docmd and indexed as docmd docs.
repo_sources: Official docs at https://docs.docmd.io/ link to GitHub; repository README at https://github.com/docmd-io/docmd links back to Website and Documentation.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Markdown documentation generator; official docs describe one-command static documentation generation and CLI commands.
